The '''SW-3 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]''' was manufactured by [[ArMek/Legends|ArMek]]. Two of these cannons were installed on the [[KonGar Ship Works]] [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|ATR Assault Transport]].

==Description==
The [[ArMek/Legends|ArMek]] SW-3 was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]]-mounted [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. Two SW-3s were carried by the [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]],<ref name="SC" /> built by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]]<ref name="Telgorn">While ''TIE Fighter'' and ''The Stele Chronicles'' list [[KonGar Ship Works]] as the manufacturer of the ATR, the later ''X-wing vs. TIE Fighter'' and ''X-wing Alliance'' list Telgorn as the manufacturer.</ref> as a more heavily armed and armored version of the company's [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]], which mounted [[SW-2 ion cannon]]s.<ref name="SC" />
